contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Bounce handling for B2B outreach pipeline: dead addresses re-queue contact discovery
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/159
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/297
  
  Details:
  First live auto-send run surfaced a delivery failure (abemassage@yahoo.com), exposing that the 'message bounced' terminal transition documented in HIT_LIST_STATE_MACHINE.md was never implemented: bounced rows kept their send counters and would age out into Manager Follow-up, generating follow-up drafts to dead inboxes. Shipped handle_warmup_bounces.py — scans Gmail delivery failures (X-Failed-Recipients header + body fallback), appends bounced_email marker to Hit List Notes, clears the Email cell, discards staged pending drafts to the dead address (sheet + Gmail), and re-queues the row to AI: Enrich with contact via shared DApp Remarks apply-semantics; gated to automated-outreach statuses, idempotent per bounce message_id. Also patched hit_list_enrich_contact.py so re-discovery excludes bounced addresses from candidate picks, and wired the handler into the hourly email-agent sync workflow. 45-day backfill run cleaned 11 rows including manual-era placeholder addresses (your@email.com, filler@godaddy.com). Plan doc tracker + changelog updated with PR4.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
